title: Gene-Expression Cell-Type Atlas: Unsupervised Linear Embedding for Downstream kNN
isolation: candidate runs as an isolated stdin->stdout subprocess via isorun; reference/test splits and cell-type labels stay in the evaluator process
strategies: random Johnson-Lindenstrauss projection centred on the training mean (reproduces the evaluator's random baseline -> ~0.1 on every atlas)

plain PCA (top-d raw principal directions): strong on clean atlases where cell-type signal is the dominant variance, but distracted by loud technical-noise / high-expression housekeeping genes on noisy and wildly-scaled atlases

standardized (z-scored) PCA folded into a single affine map z = W(x-b) with W = V diag(1/sigma): neutralizes noise/scale, locks onto correlated co-expression modules, and generalizes across the whole atlas family
supervised-flavoured unsupervised extensions (whitening + module/ICA structure, graph/locality-preserving projections, spectral embeddings) that further close the gap to the hidden Fisher-LDA oracle
